pr.title: Record-track submission: 11L XSA4 + Late Shared Workspace Adapter (LSWA-64x4) + MLP2.5

output.summary: Adds a shared late workspace adapter path atop the 11-layer trunk, reusing compact latent slots while trimming the main MLP to stay under the cap.
techniques: Late shared workspace writeback path in late decoder
LSWA-64x4 latent module reused across decoder sites
Reduced trunk MLP multiplier to 2.5 for budget
